description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold black and neon green color scheme. The upper is primarily black synthetic leather with neon green accents outlining the side panels, heel, and toe guard, as well as matching green laces. The midsole and outsole are thick and robust, with a sculpted design and green highlights that provide both style and support. The shoe includes detailed stitching, a padded collar for ankle support, and a visible logo patch on the tongue and heel tab. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for urban environments and active use. The design is modern and eye-catching, making it ideal for streetwear or sportswear.
description: A high-top black sneaker with neon green accents, thick sculpted sole, and green laces, designed for urban athletic or streetwear use. Features padded ankle support and bold, modern styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black upper with neon green accents, swooping side detail, and thick green-outlined sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the green laces, perforated toe box, and padded tongue with a logo patch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the green heel wrap, side stitching, and sculpted sole design.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, green heel accent, and a logo patch on the heel tab.
attribute_logo: rectangular patch on tongue and star-shaped patch on heel tab, both in green
